hero.h1: The AI SDR your dental practice doesn't have to manage.
hero.sub: Books consults, follows up no-shows, syncs to your PMS — while you drill. HIPAA-aware. Voice, SMS, and email. Live in 48 hours.

problem.title: Every front desk is leaking revenue.

stats.label: front-desk hours per week on follow-ups

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Four steps. No new staff to train.

frames.label: Lead arrives
frames.body: Form submit, missed call, or recall list — every channel routes here.

frames.label: AI qualifies
frames.body: Intake script branches by insurance, urgency, and procedure. HIPAA-aware copy.

frames.label: Books the slot
frames.body: Reads your live schedule, offers two real openings, holds the chair.

frames.label: PMS syncs
frames.body: Writes to Dentrix, Open Dental, or Eaglesoft. Tags the source for ROI.

features.title: PMS-native
features.body: Two-way sync with Dentrix, Open Dental, and Eaglesoft. No CSV exports.

features.title: HIPAA-aware
features.body: PHI never leaves the practice without a signed BAA. Local redaction first.

features.title: Voice + SMS + email
features.body: Same agent across channels. Picks up where the patient left off.

features.title: No-show winback
features.body: Auto-recovers cancellations within 24 hours into the same week.

features.title: Recall reactivation
features.body: Mines your inactive patient list. Books cleanings without manual outreach.

faq.a: Most solo practices are live in 48 hours. DSOs run 2–3 weeks depending on PMS environment count.
We sign a BAA on day one. PHI is redacted before any third-party model call. Audit logs are exportable.

faq.q: Will it sound like a robot?
faq.a: No. We tone-match against three of your existing recordings. Patients can request a human at any point.

faq.q: What if my PMS isn't listed?
faq.a: If you're on a top-15 dental PMS, we have a connector. Otherwise, we'll build the connector inside the Group tier.
Per location, per month. No usage surprises. You can pause for slow months.

faq.q: Can I keep my own number?
faq.a: Yes. We port or proxy. Caller ID stays your practice.

waitlistCTA.title: Be the first practice to never miss a lead.
waitlistCTA.sub: Join the waitlist for a 14-day pilot. We'll reach out within 48 hours.

posts: Dental practices lose ~$120 every time a lead doesn't get a callback. We built the AI SDR that picks up the slack — bilingual, HIPAA-aware, PMS-native. Waitlist open.
Hot take: your front desk shouldn't be doing follow-ups at 7pm. Our AI SDR does. It books real slots, syncs to Dentrix/Open Dental, and speaks Spanish like a local.
Built an SDR for dentists. Live in 48 hours. Recovers ~30% of no-shows in week one. Waitlist link in bio. Pilot pricing for the first 50 practices.
